title: CI/CD Supply Chain Secret Exposure Defense
description: Defends against CI/CD supply chain attacks involving version tag mutation, artifact poisoning, and secret harvesting from build runners. Grounded in the March 2026 Trivy-action compromise pattern.
threat_pattern: Adversaries steal privileged CI/CD tokens, mutate trusted tags, poison build artifacts, harvest runner secrets, and exfiltrate credentials or staged artifacts to attacker-controlled destinations.

simulation_steps.title: Steal CI/CD service account token via misconfiguration or prior compromise
